tasks.subject: Task 1: visualize.py color helper + coordinate lookup + renderer changes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add _assign_colors + station_coordinates, rework render_series/render_scatter to gate coloring and optionally render a stacked station map.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/visualize.py, tests/test_visualize.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/visualize.py", "tests/test_visualize.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_assign_colors deterministic distinct", "station_coordinates subset/empty", "no-station single axis no legend", "station map 2 axes + legend", "aggregate/histogram unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CLI wiring in bin/visualize.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add --station to scatter, pass color_by_station/station_points from series and scatter.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py, tests/test_visualize_cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py", "tests/test_visualize_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scatter --station filters", "series/scatter no-station PNG", "series/scatter --station PNG"]}
```
